ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station making the observation */,
  "observation_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the observation */,
  "observation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation type (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "feels_like" REAL /* Feels-like temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Wind gust speed in km/h */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall since 9 am in mm */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility in meters */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation in W/m² */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Snow depth in cm */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data tracking */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_type_id") REFERENCES observation_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the weather condition (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "icon_code" TEXT /* Code for the icon representing the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the forecast */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition for the forecast */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., daily, hourly, extended) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Forecast temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "wind_chill" REAL /* Wind chill temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "heat_index" REAL /* Heat index in degrees Celsius */,
  "rainfall_chance" INTEGER /* Chance of rainfall as a percentage */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation (e.g., rain, snow, sleet) */,
  "visibility_forecast" INTEGER /* Visibility forecast in meters */,
  "cloud_cover_forecast" INTEGER /* Forecast of cloud cover percentage */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data tracking */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warning */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station for which the warning is issued */,
  "warning_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the warning */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition for the warning */,
  "warning_type" TEXT /* Type of warning (e.g., severe thunderstorm, tornado, flash flood) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the warning (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the warning */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the warning */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Description of the affected areas */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the warning */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data tracking */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the warning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warnings_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warnings_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warnings_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station for which the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the observation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the observation type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the observation type (e.g., °C, %, km/h) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_baseline" (
  "baseline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each baseline data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station for which the baseline data is stored */,
  "baseline_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the baseline data */,
  "baseline_type" TEXT /* Type of baseline data (e.g., daily, monthly, yearly) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Baseline temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Baseline humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Baseline wind speed in km/h */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Baseline atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data tracking */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the baseline data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("baseline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_baseline_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_baseline_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
